title: Syngonanthus nitidus

This family is native to the Americas, primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions. intro: Syngonanthus nitidus is a species of flowering plant in the family Eriocaulaceae, commonly known as "erva-azeite" or "oilwort" due to its oil-rich leaves.
